description.value:
Frequency once per day

You are the prime inheritor of your progenitor star's power and can don this star's lost legacy as a crown, growing in size and power, resplendent in glory. You become Small (or Medium, if you're a massive novian). Your equipment grows with you but returns to normal size if removed. You gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage and Intimidation checks, and the area of your solar luminance (and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Absorb Light], if you're a black hole novian) is doubled. This transformation lasts for 1 minute. You can end this glorious transformation early as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.
